pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 1.3.2 to 3.4.1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x is incompatible with Java 21 and relies on removed APIs (e.g., javax.* instead of jakarta.*), causing compilation and runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure the build targets the correct JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the compiler may default to an older version or fail to recognize Java 21 features, leading to compilation errors or incorrect bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin from source/target to release flag for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in newer JDKs and do not correctly handle module path or API compatibility for Java 9+ features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE) and will fail to compile or start the application.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace embedded MongoDB libraries with Testcontainers for integration testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Old embedded MongoDB libraries often fail on modern JDKs due to native library incompatibilities or lack of maintenance, causing test runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 via Spring Boot Starter Test.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is not supported by modern Spring Boot test infrastructure which relies on JUnit 5 (Jupiter) annotations and engine.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated mockito-all with standard Mockito dependencies managed by Spring Boot.
pom.xml.why_exists: mockito-all is deprecated and incompatible with modern Java versions and Mockito 5+ features required by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Java 21 and Maven 3.9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the build fails fast if run on an incompatible JDK or Maven version, preventing subtle runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Surefire plugin configuration to use JUnit 5 patterns and remove deprecated parallel settings.
pom.xml.why_exists: Old Surefire configuration may not correctly discover or run JUnit 5 tests, leading to skipped tests or build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Failsafe plugin configuration to use JUnit 5 patterns for integration tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: Old Failsafe configuration may not correctly discover or run JUnit 5 integration tests.
